mapper.select: SELECT 'ohsCommittee' AS title ,'/OhsCommittee' AS route ,'ohsCommitteeDesc' AS description , case when ohsCommittee.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_committee thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND thp.write_year = #{searchText} AND thp.doc_type = 'OHC' ) as exist ) AS ohsCommittee UNION ALL SELECT 'partnerCommittee' AS title ,'/PartnerCommittee' AS route ,'partnerCommitteeDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN partnerCommittee.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_committee thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND thp.write_year = #{searchText} AND thp.doc_type = 'PAC' ) as exist ) AS partnerCommittee
